intent_summary: Build Field Monitor Snap-On Tool Phase 4 Scheduler Deployment. Implement GitHub Actions scheduler workflow at .github/workflows/field-monitor-scheduler.yml. Supports cron (0 6 1 * * monthly) and workflow_dispatch triggers. Inputs: batch_limit (default 500), dry_run (default false). Implement Neon due-ness query: LEFT JOIN url_registry + field_state, WHERE next_due_at <= NOW() OR (confirmation_pending=true AND recheck_due_at <= NOW()), ORDER BY next_due_at ASC, LIMIT batch_limit. When dry_run=true, build queue and log count but do NOT POST to Orchestrator Worker. Secrets: NEON_CONNECTION_STRING, ORCHESTRATOR_WORKER_URL, ORCHESTRATOR_API_KEY. Scheduler is optional — bypassed when calling sub-hub has its own scheduler. Run dry run to verify workflow builds correct job queue without dispatching.
phase_label: Scheduler Deployment — GitHub Actions Cron + Dispatch
go_condition: Workflow YAML valid. Dry run executes: correct job queue built, jobs_emitted count in summary log, no dispatches when dry_run=true.
activation_state: OPTIONAL — bypassed when calling sub-hub has own scheduler

agent_routing.auditor: Run workflow_dispatch with dry_run=true, batch_limit=500. Verify no HTTP POST, correct job count, Neon connection OK.

constraints: Do not expand scope beyond Scheduler workflow
Scheduler does NOT write to Neon under any condition
dry_run=true must suppress all dispatches — no partial dispatch
Secrets are environment variables only — never hardcoded
Must support workflow_dispatch for on-demand runs in addition to cron
